name: Shawn Connally

contactInfo.office: 200 W. Houston St., Suite 300, Marshall, TX 75670

bio: Shawn Connally serves as the District Attorney for Harrison County, prosecuting felony criminal cases in the Marshall area. He is dedicated to ensuring justice and public safety for all Harrison County residents.
campaignPromises: Prosecute violent offenders to the fullest extent of the law
Combat drug-related crime in Harrison County
Support victims of crime throughout the legal process
Maintain transparency and accountability in the DA's office
Work with law enforcement to reduce crime rates
